result.stdout:
Usage: yp <command> [options]

                                    Commands                                    
╭──────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Command      │ Description                                                   │
├──────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ setup        │ Configure AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek,   │
│              │ OpenRouter)                                                   │
│ commit       │ Stage, commit and push changes with an AI-generated message   │
│ pr           │ Generate a pull request description between two branches      │
│ checkout     │ Interactive branch checkout                                   │
│ azure-devops │ Manage Azure DevOps resources                                 │
│ skill        │ Install the yp skill for your AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor,  │
│              │ Gemini CLI...)                                                │
╰──────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

commit options:
╭───────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Flag                          │ Description                                  │
├───────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ --confirm                     │ Ask for confirmation before committing       │
│ --detailed                    │ Generate detailed commit with title + body   │
│ --language <lang>, --lang, -l │ Output language (e.g., english, spanish,     │
│                               │ french)                                      │
│ --save                        │ Save commit message to a markdown file       │
╰───────────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────╯

pr options:
╭───────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Flag                          │ Description                                  │
├───────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ --detailed                    │ Generate detailed PR description             │
│ --language <lang>, --lang, -l │ Output language (e.g., english, spanish,     │
│                               │ french)                                      │
│ --save                        │ Save PR description to a markdown file       │
╰───────────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────╯

azure-devops subcommands:
╭───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬──╮
│ Subcommand                                                                │  │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──┤
│ repo new                                                                  │  │
│ repo checkout                                                             │  │
│ variable-group list                                                       │  │
│ hu task                                                                   │  │
│ hu task <org> <proj> <hu-id> [--description "..."] [--effort "..."]       │  │
│ hu show                                                                   │  │
│ hu show <org> <hu-id>                                                     │  │
│ hu list                                                                   │  │
│ hu list <org> <proj> <hu-id>                                              │  │
│ hu link                                                                   │  │
│ hu link <org> <proj> <hu-id> --repo <repo> --branch <branch>              │  │
│ task show                                                                 │  │
│ task show <org> <id>                                                      │  │
│ task update                                                               │  │
│ task update <org> <id> [--effort <e>] [--effort-real <er>] [--remaining   │  │
│ <r>] [--state <s>] [--comment <c>]                                        │  │
│ link                                                                      │  │
│ link <org> <proj> <wi-id>                                                 │  │
╰───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴──╯

Examples:
  yp setup                                        # Configure AI provider
  yp skill                                        # Install skill for your AI 
agent
  yp commit                                       # Auto commit and push
  yp commit --confirm                             # Review before committing
  yp commit --detailed -l spanish                 # Detailed commit in Spanish
  yp pr                                           # Generate PR description
  yp pr --detailed -l french                      # Detailed PR description in 
French
  yp checkout                                     # Switch branch interactively
  yp azure-devops hu task                         # Create tasks interactively
  yp azure-devops hu show MyOrg 12345             # Show HU details
  yp azure-devops task show MyOrg 67890           # Show Task details
  yp azure-devops task update MyOrg 67890 --state "Doing" --effort-real "3"  # 
Update task
  yp azure-devops hu link MyOrg MyProj 12345 --repo MyRepo --branch feature/abc
# Link branch
  yp azure-devops hu list MyOrg MyProj 12345      # List tasks of HU
  yp azure-devops link MyOrg MyProj 12345         # Add link to work item
